report.summary: Community growth cycle v14 (Mar 17 Late): Pre-FOMC-decision morning content — 4 new Twitter posts (FOMC decision day reminder, Solana ETF guide launch, Crypto Payroll guide launch, Institutional Credit Markets preview); Discord FOMC morning briefing + post-decision template; newsletter updated with FOMC recap section + 2 new guide spotlights (Solana ETF, Crypto Payroll) added to Thu issue; 2 social cards created (Solana ETF Race 5-issuer comparison + Institutional Credit Markets 4-protocol overview); posting schedule updated through Mar 22; post-decision reaction templates prepared for live fill.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 1 (Wed AM): FOMC Decision Day reminder — timeline (2PM decision, 2:30PM presser, 3-4PM volatility peak), what to watch (dot plot, GDP/inflation forecasts, Powell tariff tone), BTC $73,700 8-day streak, 'Don't trade the headline. Trade the reaction to the reaction'; links to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide

Tweet 2 (Wed AM): Solana ETF Guide launch — 6 issuers filed; VanEck (first mover, staking-inclusive), 21Shares (Coinbase custody), Grayscale (GSOL trust convert), Canary (multi-asset), Bitwise (low-cost); approval timeline + staking yield advantage; CTA to /learn/solana-etf-guide-2026

Tweet 3 (Wed AM): Crypto Payroll Guide launch — getting paid in crypto is mainstream now; Deel/Bitwage/Request Finance platform comparison, tax implications, stablecoin payroll thesis, how to pitch to employer; CTA to /learn/crypto-payroll-guide-2026

Tweet 4 (Wed AM): Institutional Credit Markets preview — $18.9B active on-chain credit, $33.7B cumulative; Maple Finance ($3.2B TVL, 8x growth), Goldfinch (Ares/Apollo), Centrifuge (RWA infra), Clearpool (hybrid permissioned); 'Under-covered. Under-allocated. Worth understanding.' — hype build for upcoming guide

Tweet 5 (Wed PM): FOMC reaction TEMPLATE — live fill after 2PM ET decision; dot plot result, BTC/ETH price reaction, key Powell quote, 48h reversal pattern reminder; links to updated FOMC guide + DCA calc
Discord (Wed AM): FOMC morning briefing — timeline, current BTC setup, 98% hold probability, key watches, prep reading link; live reaction thread announcement
Discord (Wed PM): Post-decision update TEMPLATE — rate decision result, dot plot, BTC/ETH reaction, Powell quotes, portfolio implications links

Newsletter updates (Thu Mar 19): Added Market Pulse section (FOMC recap template), 2 new guide spotlights (Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll), consolidated with v14 guides (GPU Compute, DeFi Insurance, Yield-Bearing Stablecoins) for 5-guide newsletter

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-solana-etf-race-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with Solana purple-green gradient accents; NEW GUIDE + $SOL badges; 'THE SOLANA ETF RACE' title; 5 glass-morphism issuer cards (VanEck purple/first mover, 21Shares cyan/institutional, Grayscale amber/trust convert, Canary purple/multi-asset, Bitwise green/low-cost); right sidebar stat boxes (Staking Yield 6-8%, 6 Issuers Filed); bottom bar with guide URL. sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC Decision Day (Mar 18): Decision in <18 hours. BTC $73,700 holding with 8-day streak intact. 98% hold probability. Market cap $2.65T. This is the highest-traffic catalyst window in 6 weeks.

New content amplification: Solana ETF Guide + Crypto Payroll Guide promoted to PUBLISHED in publish-v10 (now 397+ unique slugs) — first social push in this cycle. Institutional Credit Markets guide in PUBLISH_QUEUE as preview/hype build.
Content pipeline: Maple Finance ecosystem guide + On-Chain Institutional Credit learn guide built in build-v10, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Next publish cycle will promote them.

Newsletter consolidation: Thu Mar 19 issue now features 5 new guides (GPU Compute, DeFi Insurance, Yield-Bearing Stablecoins from v14 + Solana ETF, Crypto Payroll from v15) + FOMC recap as Market Pulse section.
Site is Day 57, GSC Day 18+ — organic clicks expected to materialize. 397+ published pages. FOMC content perfectly timed for organic arrival window.

Posting schedule: Wed AM — FOMC reminder + Solana ETF launch + Crypto Payroll launch + Institutional Credit preview + Discord briefing → Wed PM — FOMC reaction (live) + Discord update → Thu — newsletter with 5 guides + FOMC recap → Fri poll → Sat BTCFi → Sun Aave V4
